\tzpentry{ID5919}{Donut Holes Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5919 introduces Donut Holes Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi_{m,n} = e^{i(m\theta_1 + n\theta_2)} \end{equation}
